headline: What Cigna Group (CI)'s US$100 Million Pharmacy Forward AI Bet Means For Shareholders
summary: On 1 July 2026, Evernorth, The Cigna Group’s health services division, launched Pharmacy Forward, a US$100 million AI-powered program to streamline specialty pharmacy care through Accredo, aiming to accelerate prescription processing, improve adherence, and cut clinician documentation time. The program is intended to generate about US$0.40 billion in value by 2028 while using AI to halve time-to-medication and place 90% of patients within a one-day or same-day shipping radius. We’ll now...

headline: The Unpopular Move That Telegraphed the Elevance Health Stock Surge
summary: While Wall Street fixated on a gloomy forecast, the company was making a painful but telling choice that hinted at the turnaround to come.
